title: halimium × gandogeri
intro: Halimium × gandogeri, also known as Rockrose, is a hybrid plant species within the Cistaceae family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which make it beneficial for wound healing, reducing pain and swelling, and fighting off infections. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including its ability to soothe skin irritations, promote tissue repair, and reduce the risk of infection. Rockrose is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and topical creams, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
